title: Lily — The Behavioral-Health Platform Built for All Three Sides
description: Lily is three connected products: Lily Care for members, Lily Practice for clinicians, and Lily Admin for organizations. One source of truth for matching, scheduling, telehealth, notes, billing, and outcomes.
keywords: mental health platform, therapy matching, behavioral health, identity-aware matching, HIPAA telehealth, therapist directory, wellness coaching, employee mental health benefit
heroEyebrow: Three apps · one platform · live in 50 states
heroTitle: The behavioral-health platform built for all three sides.
heroSubtitle: Lily is three connected products: Lily Care for members, Lily Practice for clinicians, and Lily Admin for organizations. Web and mobile. One source of truth for matching, scheduling, telehealth, notes, billing, and outcomes.

sections.heading: One system of record. Three lived experiences.
sections.body: Each side gets a product that fits how they actually work — and they all stay in sync. Match flows into scheduling, scheduling into notes, notes into outcomes. No copy-paste between tools.

sections.heading: Match on the things that actually predict alliance.
sections.body: Forty years of psychotherapy research keep landing on the same finding: the relationship matters more than the modality. Lily Match encodes that into a fit score across eight identity-aware dimensions — so members find someone who already gets it, on session one.

sections.heading: Built around the four numbers that matter.
sections.body: Every Lily surface — match, schedule, notes, dashboard — is engineered to drive these four.

matchBullets: Identity, language, faith, neurodiversity, lived experience
Modality preference (CBT, EMDR, IFS, somatic, & more)

testimonial.quote: The first time in twelve years I haven't had to explain to a therapist what it means to be Black, queer, and the eldest daughter of immigrants. Lily put that on the page before I said a word.
testimonial.name: Ada C.

features.title: Lily Care
features.body: Identity-aware matching across 8 dimensions for members. Swipe to explore or browse the full directory. Re-match anytime.

features.title: Lily Practice
features.body: The whole practice on one screen. Pre-matched referrals, AI-assisted notes, telehealth, billing, and outcomes.

features.title: Lily Admin
features.body: A mental-health benefit your members actually use. Identity-aware network, de-identified outcomes, SSO-ready.

stats.label: Higher continuation past session four vs. directory matching
Members report identity affirmation in the first session
Median time from sign-up to first booked session

cta.title: Care that fits, on the platform that holds all of it.
cta.subtitle: Join the alpha. We're inviting members, practitioners, and organizations in waves — reserve your spot now.
